The '''''Liberator''''' was a [[Liberator-class troopship|''Liberator''-class Troopship]] from the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], during which it bore the name '''''Guardian of the Republic'''''.

==History==
The ''Liberator'' was capable of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel, though it was slow by modern standards. The vessel was decommissioned shortly before the end of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In the wake of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was owned and captained by [[Garris Shrike]], who had renamed the vessel '''''Trader's Luck'''''. It was on this ship that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] spent his formative years, as an unwilling member of Shrike's band of spacers.

In [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], the ''Trader's Luck'' was bought at scrap prices by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was restored for use as a troop ship, and renamed the ''Liberator''. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], ''Liberator'' was used to evacuate freed [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesian]] slaves following the [[Battle of Ylesia]].
